name: scvi-tools
tagline: Guides use of scvi-tools (scVI, totalVI, MultiVI, etc.) for single-cell batch correction, integration, and differential expression.
verdict: Well-scoped reference skill with clear triggers, versioned metadata, and a context-economical structure. Gaps: none of the 8 cited references/*.md files are present in the bundle, scanpy is used in the workflow but never declared as a dependency, no failure-path guidance for install/training steps, and the default install command is unpinned.

highlights.summary: Default install of the well-known scvi-tools package is unpinned; pinning is only offered as an optional aside.
No guidance anywhere for failures of install, setup_anndata, or model.train() across the multi-step workflow.
Cites 8 references/*.md files (models-*, workflows, theoretical-foundations, differential-expression) none of which appear in the skill bundle.
